title: stelis glacensis
intro: Stelis glacensis, also known as the Glacier Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Stelis glacensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, although its availability and usage may vary due to its limited cultivation and distribution.
